skippedRootCauseCategories.reason: Diagnosed but intentionally left for a later ablation; depth venue mapping and payload compaction are separate from argument extraction.

changes: Normalized Velo row filters so options calls keep coins and drop products, while futures/spot calls keep products and drop coins when both are supplied.
Mapped singular liquidation column aliases to Velo's plural column names before column validation.
Guarded invalid end=0 and invalid begin windows by falling back to the requested lookback ending at Date.now().
Updated get_market_rows and analyze_futures_market_structure descriptions to tell the planner to pass either products or coins and to use lookbackHours for latest/current windows.

notes: Release decision schemaVersion was 2026-04-17; the schema validator shell command was blocked by the pipeline control-plane guard before execution.
The fix was deployed to the VPS with examples/server/deploy.sh and setup-servers.sh; public /velo/health returned ok and /velo/mcp tools/list exposed the updated get_market_rows description.
Rerun results show velo-03 and velo-13 returned Velo-backed answers instead of the previous must choose products or coins failures.
velo-14 and velo-19 could not complete during the rerun because the Context API returned insufficient_allowance before execution.

rerunOutcomes.outcome: Returned a venue comparison answer with Velo Market Data; contributor_tool_bug remains the skipped category for later review.
Returned latest Deribit BTC options values for index_price, iv_1w, iv_1m, skew_1w, skew_1m, and dollar_volume.
Returned a spot-versus-futures support comparison using both spot dollar volume and futures OI/funding evidence; final code also guards the end=0 retry noise observed in this rerun.
Context API returned insufficient_allowance before execution, so no post-fix developer trace was collected.
Context API returned insufficient_allowance before execution, so no post-fix developer trace was collected.
